title: Mob Statues
description: Minecraft mod focusing on adding Mob Statues and making the game feel better
body:
# Mob Statues
## Mod offers:
1. High quality statues
1. Costum crafting recipes in stonecutter
1. compatibility with shaders
  
- Mod is Vannila friendly wich means that all the statues are crafteble and mineable in survival.
- This is a decoration mod so you and your friends can have more fun building!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2deab6fc661fac095a7bc13ca155174fa3a2def.png)

(Mod still in development)
